title: Front Office Manager - Sarovar Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Sarovar Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Sarovar Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sarovar Hotels:
Sarovar Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sarovar Hotels!
